title: elaphoglossum platyneuron
intro: Elaphoglossum platyneuron is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to relieve pain, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Elaphoglossum platyneuron include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal benefits.
